content.content:
"use client" import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card" import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge" import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button" import Link from "next/link" import { useEffect, useState } from "react" import { isClient } from "@/lib/utils" export default function Home() { const [timeLeft, setTimeLeft] = useState({ hours: 24, minutes: 0, seconds: 0 }) const [mounted, setMounted] = useState(false) useEffect(() => { if (!isClient()) return setMounted(true) const endTime = localStorage.getItem("hackathonEndTime") let targetTime: number if (endTime) { targetTime = parseInt(endTime) } else { const now = Date.now() targetTime = now + 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000 // 24 hours from now localStorage.setItem("hackathonEndTime", targetTime.toString()) } const timer = setInterval(() => { const now = Date.now() const diff = targetTime - now if (diff <= 0) { setTimeLeft({ hours: 0, minutes: 0, seconds: 0 }) clearInterval(timer) } else { const hours = Math.floor(diff / (1000 * 60 * 60)) const minutes = Math.floor((diff % (1000 * 60 * 60)) / (1000 * 60)) const seconds = Math.floor((diff % (1000 * 60)) / 1000) setTimeLeft({ hours, minutes, seconds }) } }, 1000) return () => clearInterval(timer) }, []) const criteria = [ { name: "Creativity", description: "How innovative and unique is your approach?" }, { name: "Design", description: "How visually appealing and well-designed is the UI?" }, { name: "Similarity", description: "How closely does it match the original iOS app?" }, { name: "Performance", description: "How well does it run and function?" }, ] return (
{/* Header */}
Iteration #1

Vibecoding Hackathon

24 hours to recreate an iOS app. No rules, just pure creativity.

{/* Countdown Timer */} Time Remaining
{timeLeft.hours.toString().padStart(2, "0")}
Hours
{timeLeft.minutes.toString().padStart(2, "0")}
Minutes
{timeLeft.seconds.toString().padStart(2, "0")}
Seconds
 {/* Judging Criteria */} Judging Criteria Your submissions will be evaluated on these four categories
{criteria.map((criterion) => (

● {criterion.name}

{criterion.description}

))}
{/* How It Works */} How It Works
1

Get Started

Clone the repository and check out the STARTER.md for setup instructions

2

Build Your App

Choose any tech stack and recreate the selected iOS app in 24 hours

3

Submit Your Work

Make your repo public and submit the URL before the deadline

4

Judging & Results

Judges evaluate submissions and results are announced on the leaderboard

 {/* Quick Actions */}
) }

"use client" import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button" import Link from "next/link" import { useEffect, useState } from "react" import { isClient } from "@/lib/utils" export default function Home() { const [timeLeft, setTimeLeft] = useState({ hours: 24, minutes: 0, seconds: 0 }) useEffect(() => { if (!isClient()) return const endTime = localStorage.getItem("hackathonEndTime") let targetTime: number if (endTime) { targetTime = parseInt(endTime) } else { const now = Date.now() targetTime = now + 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000 localStorage.setItem("hackathonEndTime", targetTime.toString()) } const timer = setInterval(() => { const now = Date.now() const diff = targetTime - now if (diff <= 0) { setTimeLeft({ hours: 0, minutes: 0, seconds: 0 }) clearInterval(timer) } else { const hours = Math.floor(diff / (1000 * 60 * 60)) const minutes = Math.floor((diff % (1000 * 60 * 60)) / (1000 * 60)) const seconds = Math.floor((diff % (1000 * 60)) / 1000) setTimeLeft({ hours, minutes, seconds }) } }, 1000) return () => clearInterval(timer) }, []) return (
{/* Grid Pattern Background */}
{/* Animated Glowing Orbs */}
{/* Main Content */}
{/* Hero Section */}

","lineNumber":{"old":164,"new":182}}],"content":"\"use client\"\n\nimport { Button } from \"@/components/ui/button\"\nimport Link from \"next/link\"\nimport { useEffect, useState } from \"react\"\nimport { isClient } from \"@/lib/utils\"\n\nexport default function Home() {\n const [timeLeft, setTimeLeft] = useState({ hours: 24, minutes: 0, seconds: 0 })\n\n useEffect(() => {\n if (!isClient()) return\n\n const endTime = localStorage.getItem(\"hackathonEndTime\")\n let targetTime: number\n\n if (endTime) {\n targetTime = parseInt(endTime)\n } else {\n const now = Date.now()\n targetTime = now + 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000\n localStorage.setItem(\"hackathonEndTime\", targetTime.toString())\n }\n\n const timer = setInterval(() => {\n const now = Date.now()\n const diff = targetTime - now\n\n if (diff <= 0) {\n setTimeLeft({ hours: 0, minutes: 0, seconds: 0 })\n clearInterval(timer)\n } else {\n const hours = Math.floor(diff / (1000 * 60 * 60))\n const minutes = Math.floor((diff % (1000 * 60 * 60)) / (1000 * 60))\n const seconds = Math.floor((diff % (1000 * 60)) / 1000)\n setTimeLeft({ hours, minutes, seconds })\n }\n }, 1000)\n\n return () => clearInterval(timer)\n }, [])\n\n return (\n
\n {/* Grid Pattern Background */}\n
\n \n {/* Animated Glowing Orbs */}\n
\n
\n
\n
\n
\n\n {/* Main Content */}\n
\n
\n {/* Hero Section */}\n
\n
\n 🏆 Menorca Hackathon 2025\n
\n

\n \n Vibe\n \n \n Coding\n \n

\n

\n 24 hours to recreate an iOS app. No rules, just pure creativity.\n

\n \n {/* CTA Buttons */}\n
\n \n \n
\n
\n\n {/* Countdown Timer */}\n
\n

Effects are intended to synchronize state between React and external systems such as manually updating the DOM, state management libraries, or other platform APIs. In general, the body of an effect should do one or both of the following:
* Update external systems with the latest state from React.
* Subscribe for updates from some external system, calling setState in a callback function when external state changes.

Calling setState synchronously within an effect body causes cascading renders that can hurt performance, and is not recommended. (https://react.dev/learn/you-might-not-need-an-effect).

I've updated the landing page with the modern dark theme design from your image. Here's what changed:

**Landing Page (`src/app/page.tsx`):**
- Dark background (#0A0A0A) with subtle grid pattern
- Animated glowing orbs (orange, purple, blue) with pulse effects
- Gradient text for "VibeCoding" with orange accent
- Large, bold typography matching the image style
- Modern countdown timer with glassmorphism effect
- Feature cards with hover effects and emoji icons
- Updated "How It Works" section with numbered steps

**Navigation (`src/components/navigation.tsx`):**
- Dark theme with backdrop blur
- Gradient "VibeCoding" logo (orange)
- Clean navigation links with hover states
- Modern sign-up button with orange gradient
- Responsive design (mobile-friendly)

**Layout (`src/app/layout.tsx`):**
- Set dark mode as default

The design now matches the modern, dark aesthetic from your landing image with the orange accent colors and animated elements.
